diagrams.title: 3-Variable Karnaugh Map
diagrams.description: Shows arrangement of 8 cells with Gray code labeling for minterms m0-m7
elements: Row labels: A'B', A'B, AB, AB'
diagrams.purpose: Understanding K-map structure and cell addressing for Boolean simplification

diagrams.title: Flip-Flop State Transition Diagrams
diagrams.description: Four diagrams showing state transitions for SR, JK, D, and T flip-flops
elements: For T: toggle and hold paths
For D: direct Q → Q+ path
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing flip-flop behavior and understanding excitation table relationships

diagrams.title: Master-Slave JK Flip-Flop Circuit
diagrams.description: Block diagram of master-slave configuration eliminating race-around condition
elements: Clock input with inversion for slave
Timing annotation showing master active then slave active
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how race-around condition is eliminated and edge-triggered behavior achieved

diagrams.title: K-map Grouping Examples
diagrams.description: Shows various valid groupings in 2, 3, and 4-variable K-maps
diagrams.purpose: Learning correct grouping technique and variable elimination rule
